data.name: Benefitship
data.detailed_description:
Enjoy a short and linear erotic visual novel illustrated by Sulcate. Experience the rising sexual tension between a futanari and her roommate as their "friendship" develops.



Amy is a pretty chill and extroverted girl, who loves doing yoga in the living room. Her new roommate will be arriving shortly. Hopefully they'll be able to get along.
Voiced by Baku Satsu.



Chloe is the concerning combination of being both extremely introverted and constantly horny. Unbeknownst to her new roommate, she's also a futanari, with everything that entails.
Voiced by Gina Galore.


  • High quality futa x female content, illustrated by Sulcate. Full HD, 1080p.
  • Between 10.000 and 20.000 words.
  • Full voice acting. (Can be disabled)
  • NSFW sound effects. (Can be disabled)
  • 30+ CG illustrations (including alts).
  • A wide range of emotive expressions for both characters.

data.short_description: A futa x female friends-with-benefits visual novel illustrated by Sulcate. Features full voice acting.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
